document: Eyebolt M6 DIN 580: M6 lifting eye bolt per DIN 580. Screws into bulkhead T-nut or threaded insert. Primary recovery attachment point for shock cord. Eye inner diameter 20mm, accepts quick link up to 14mm wire. Standard: DIN 580. Thread: M6. Material: steel. Eye inner diameter: 20mm. Use cases: shock cord anchor, recovery attachment, bulkhead mount, lifting point. Geometry source: build123d==0.10.0.

document: Rail Button 1010: Standard rail button for 1010 8020 aluminum extrusion launch rail. Button width 9.0mm fits 1010 T-slot. Mounted to rocket body tube with single screw through center. Guides rocket along launch rail, releases cleanly at lift-off. Material: delrin. Rail size: 1010. Use cases: launch rail guide, launch lug replacement. Geometry source: build123d==0.10.0.

metadata.name: Rail Button 1010

document: Quick Link 3mm: 3mm wire oval quick link (screw-gate). Connects shock cord to eyebolt, parachute bridle to harness, or swivel to recovery hardware. Working load limit ~400kg. Inner opening 11x25mm. Material: stainless steel. Wire diameter: 3mm. Inner opening: 11x25mm. Working load limit: 400kg. Use cases: shock cord to eyebolt, parachute bridle, recovery harness, swivel connection. Geometry source: build123d==0.10.0.

document: GoPro Step Mount: 3-prong GoPro-compatible finger mount for rocket camera bay. Standard GoPro pivoting finger mount geometry. Accepts GoPro Hero/Session cameras and compatible action cameras. Base mounts to payload bay step adapter with 4x M3 screws. Pivot hole accepts M5 thumb screw. Standard: GoPro finger mount. Use cases: camera bay, nose cone camera, payload section. Geometry source: build123d==0.10.0.

metadata.name: GoPro Step Mount
metadata.description: 3-prong GoPro-compatible finger mount for rocket camera bay. Standard GoPro pivoting finger mount geometry. Accepts GoPro Hero/Session cameras and compatible action cameras. Base mounts to payload bay step adapter with 4x M3 screws. Pivot hole accepts M5 thumb screw.
